content.en:
Time passed, long years later.

Ye Tian's immeasurable blood had finally completed the fourth transformation.

At this moment, Ye Tian's flesh and blood body continued to become stronger, until a long time later, he completely stepped into the realm of four blood transformations.

"Breakthrough, four Blood Transformation Realms, with my current strength, should be comparable to the top six Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors!" Ye Tian said confidently.

With his current strength, as long as he doesn't encounter the Seven Blood Transformation Realm, there is almost no major danger.

"Take a trip to the Cosmos Tower and see if you can break through the twelfth floor of the Cosmos Tower!"

Soon, Ye Tian entered the Huanyu Tower.

Twelfth floor.

Here, Ye Tian encountered a six-time Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor.

Subsequently, Ye Tian fought with him, defeated him very easily, and then broke into the thirteenth layer.

The strength of the thirteenth layer of the Heavenly Ancestor was at the top six Blood Transformation Realm combat power.

Ye Tian also fought with him for a long time, relying on the ancient technique, only to consume it to the point that it was difficult to recover, and then he won.

After breaking through the thirteenth floor, his authority was also greatly improved.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian continued to retreat, using Taiyuan Golden Water to temper his heart.

However, the effect of Taiyuan Golden Water has been greatly reduced, and if you want to refine your heart to the limit of the Four Blood Transformation Realm, you will need more than 100,000 Taiyuan Golden Water.

And in a short period of time, it was impossible for Ye Tian to obtain so much Taiyuan Golden Water.

However, he still refined the Taiyuan gold water in his hand one by one, and how much he could refine.

In the years that followed, Ye Tian's strength increased very little, and there was no way to make his strength skyrocket in a short period of time.

Unless—

"Unless I can get another primeval art!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He checked it on the Cosmos Space-Time Trading Network, and there was no Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor selling the Ancient Technique, but he still found some news about the Ancient Technique in the Cosmos City.

Top Blood Transformation Realm races like the Ancient Demon Ape Clan and the White Shadow Elephant Clan all possessed primeval techniques.

However, under normal circumstances, it would be good to have an ancient art inheritance.

Moreover, Ye Tian also found out about the origin of the primeval technique.

Before the unimaginable primeval times of the territorial seas, there was a primeval gold tree that was covered with primeval gold leaves.

Under the long years of evolution, these primeval gold leaves gave birth to a primeval technique, and later the primeval war broke out, countless primeval races fell, and pieces of primeval gold leaves were scattered everywhere.

Some were acquired by the top primeval races, while others landed in unknown places.

And with the passage of time, the primeval races in the seams of the territorial waters continue to fight, and the surviving primeval races are much rarer.

As for the primeval gold leaf, it is becoming more and more rare, after all, the race that owns the primeval gold leaf will not say it, and the primeval gold leaf that is really exposed is very rare.

Moreover, Ye Tian now finally knew why the Ancient Golden Turtle Clan didn't take the Ancient Golden Leaf.

First of all, moving the Ancient Gold Leaf requires a very strong strength, at least six Blood Transformation Realm strengths, and secondly, once moved, the Ancient Gold Leaf will emit strong fluctuations that will spread throughout a very distant area.

In this way, the aura of the primeval gold leaf was exposed.

If you want to cover the aura of the Ancient Gold Leaf, you need at least eight Blood Transformation Realm strengths.

However, the Ancient Golden Turtle Clan did not have eight Blood Transformation Realm creatures, otherwise they would not be afraid of the Ancient Demon Ape Clan.

Of course, there is another way to mask the fluctuations caused by the movement of the primeval gold leaf, and that is to use the primeval technique to seal it.

"My current strength is comparable to the top six Blood Transformation Realms, I can move that primeval gold leaf, and I can use the primeval technique to seal that primeval gold leaf, so that the primeval gold leaf does not emit fluctuations. In this way, if I take that primeval gold leaf, no one will know!"

However, he had already released the copy body of the primeval golden turtle in the place where the primeval gold leaf was.

If he wanted to take the Ancient Gold Leaf, he had to go to that place again.

......

The Ancient Sea of Turtles.

Ye Tian's copy body came here again, only to find that there were a few white shadows hidden nearby.

"The White Shadow Elephant Clan actually sent their clansmen to guard here again, it seems that I asked about the Ancient Golden Blood last time to attract their attention!"

Ye Tian muttered.

However, these white shadows were not powerful, they were only five blood transformation realms.

Thinking that the White Shadow Elephant Clan had made a move on his replica body before, he naturally wouldn't be polite to these White Shadow Elephants.

So, he copied several duplicate bodies, preparing to attack these white shadows at the same time, killing them instantly, so that they didn't even have a chance to communicate.

Soon.

Ye Tian made a move.

Rumble!!!

Although several white shadows were in different positions, they were all killed by Ye Tian in an instant at the same time.

Then, Ye Tian released the copy body of an ancient golden turtle that had already been copied, found that location, and escaped into it again.

"The ancient gold leaf is still there!"

Ye Tian immediately used the Ancient God and Demon Fist, an ancient technique, to gather into a force to wrap this Ancient Golden Leaf and seal it.

Then, he grabbed the primeval gold leaf and pulled it hard.

Last time, he couldn't shake this primeval gold leaf, but now he can easily shake it.

Swish!

Ye Tian took this primeval gold leaf, put it away, and then escaped from here.

Then, as fast as he could, he disappeared.

Soon after.

One by one, the powerhouses of the Blood Transformation Realm of the White Shadow Elephant came here, including Chihe of the Seven Blood Transformation Realm.

"Several clansmen sent to monitor here were all killed, and they were killed instantly, and they didn't even have time to react, and the minimum number of shots was six blood transformation realms, and there was more than one. Chihe judged.

"Who killed it?"

Ji Heng asked.

"It shouldn't be the Ancient Golden Turtle Clan, where do they dare to kill our White Shadow Elephant Clan, it should be other forces, such as when there was a three-time Blood Transformation Realm creature to collect the Ancient Golden Blood, the other party committed suicide directly, maybe the mastermind behind the Blood Transformation Realm who controlled him killed, and maybe even the Ancient Golden Leaf was taken away!" Chihe guessed.

"Wouldn't the primeval golden leaf be taken away and cause fluctuations?" said a Blood Transformation Realm White Shadow Elephant.

"If you make eight Blood Transformation Realm shots, there will be no fluctuations!"

Chihe said solemnly.

Eight Blood Transformations!

The faces of many blood change realms changed, this is a strong man comparable to the patriarch!

"Let's go, the other party has long since disappeared, and we can't find it. As for that primeval gold leaf, there is a high probability that it is gone!" Chihe is gone.

The other white shadows are gone!
